hexInfo: Hexadecimal color notation, most common in web development
rgbInfo: Red, Green, Blue - additive color model for screens
hslInfo: Hue, Saturation, Lightness - intuitive color adjustments
hsvInfo: Hue, Saturation, Value (Brightness) - also known as HSB, common in color pickers
hwbInfo: Hue, Whiteness, Blackness - CSS4 color format, no alpha support
labInfo: CIE LAB - perceptually uniform color space, no alpha support
lchInfo: Lightness, Chroma, Hue - cylindrical LAB, easier hue adjustments, no alpha
cmykInfo: Cyan, Magenta, Yellow, Key (Black) - print standard, no alpha support
keywordInfo: CSS named colors like red, blue, coral - 140+ predefined colors, no alpha
